seo.title: Odyssey | Premium automated cinematic memorial videos
seo.description: Odyssey is a premium platform for automated cinematic commemorative video creation to preserve, share, and honor memory.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: Questions about a tribute, an ongoing project, or uncertainty before ordering? Tell us where you stand — we respond thoughtfully.

partnersPage.title: Odyssey partnerships
partnersPage.subtitle: Funeral homes, networks, and bereavement professionals: offer families a cinematic remembrance journey. Describe your organization and needs — we’ll explore a tailored rollout.

hooks: Their life deserves the big screen.
A tribute fit for the big screen.
steps: Three steps. A film for keeps.
Three steps. A presence that stays.
Three steps. Memory that lives on.
Three steps. A tribute that honors them.
memory: Their story, cut like a film.

pricing.title: My Life in Cinema
pricing.subtitle: Choose how deeply you want to honor their story — each tier lets you move at your own pace.

tiers.style: Sensitive pacing, music at the heart
features: Weaving in moments from loved ones
Focus on the passages that matter most

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.body: Every life is a masterpiece that deserves its own cinema. Odyssey is not a tool; it is a visual sanctuary. In the noise of grief, we orchestrate silence, light, and memory to create an unbreakable bond. We don't just make videos; we restore the sovereign dignity of remembrance.

process.title: THE ODYSSEY PROCESS
process.timelineHint: Three chapters of one film — material, edit, legacy.
process.subtitle: Three steps for families: gather what matters, entrust the edit, receive a film worthy of them.

steps.title: Your photos, videos, and archives
steps.body: You upload what tells their story. We secure every fragment with a clear, respectful structure.

steps.title: The edit takes shape
steps.body: We compose rhythm, light, and narrative to honor the family’s emotion and intent.

steps.title: A film meant to be shared
steps.body: The film becomes something to pass on: restrained, cinematic, faithful to the dignity of remembrance.

partnerships.title: A cinematic standard for high-trust funeral homes.
partnerships.body: Offer every family a premium remembrance experience that is elegant, reliable, and respectful of grief. Families choose their tribute and tier in the pricing section above.
